meaning: n.(芬兰童话中矮胖、害羞并冬眠的)森林小人
examples: The player will help the Moomin family in their quest to find Moominpappa by solving many different puzzles in this adventure-style game.
Each location features food, drink and decor inspired by the whimsical franchise, but the main draw is clearly the option to dine with a wide-eyed Moomin of your own.
